title: dracontomelon edule
intro: Dracontomelon edule, also known as the dragon plum or mayapis, is a tropical tree species native to Southeast Asia. Its fruit, seeds, and leaves have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dracontomelon edule include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating digestive issues, as well as being used to lower cholesterol levels and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the fruit, seeds, and leaves are often used to make teas, infusions, and extracts that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
